label: NEUTRAL
tldr: Health Care earns a cautious neutral lean: XLV's short-term technicals are improving after reclaiming the 50-day MA, but persistent outflows, UNH's DOJ probe, Medicaid cuts, and a hawkish Fed cap the bullish case — the best plays are stock-specific (LLY on GLP-1 dominance, ISRG on robotic surgery recovery) rather than a pure ETF long.
